Typefinity is a personal project for my own use. It's a general-purposeTypeScript library with helper scripts to quickly set up a template project, build scripts and VSCode debug configuration. Please refer to GitHub for:

- [Documentation](https://github.com/david-04/typefinity/blob/main/README.md)
- [Release notes](https://github.com/david-04/typefinity/blob/main/CHANGELOG.md)
